title: Screen Catalog Registry Schema
description: Schema for Mockups/screen-catalog.json — the master inventory of screens across a project. Written/read by .claude/scripts/shared/lib/screen-catalog.js and consumed by /catalog-screens, /mockups, and /design-system. See PRD: PRD/Screen-Design-Pipeline/PRD-Screen-Design-Pipeline.md (#2333).

version.description: Catalog schema version. Bumped on breaking schema changes.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last catalog write

lastModified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last catalog write (alias of generatedAt)

screens.description: Screens keyed by screen name (e.g., 'Home', 'ProfileWizard'). Names are stable identifiers referenced by canonicalSpec, parent, navigatesTo, modals, and children.

screenEntry.description: A single screen in the catalog. status + kind + canonicalSpec are the minimal identity; everything else is topology, provenance, or token wiring.

status.description: Lifecycle state. planned = in catalog, not yet implemented. active = in source, in use. deprecated = still in source, scheduled for removal. removed = no longer in source; entry kept as historical record.

kind.description: Structural role. page = top-level route. wizard = multi-step flow container. step = one step of a wizard. section = named region of a page. modal = overlay. component = reusable UI atom referenced by other screens.

canonicalSpec.description: Project-relative path to the screen spec JSON (e.g., 'Mockups/Home/Screen.json'). Must resolve inside project root; path-traversal inputs are rejected by the helper per NFR-3.

source.description: Source file(s) this screen was discovered from (e.g., 'src/routes/home/+page.svelte'). Null when the screen is planned but not yet in source.

route.description: URL route for pages (e.g., '/profile/settings'). Null for non-routed screens (components, sections, steps).

introduced.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the screen first entered the catalog

lastModified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this entry

parent.description: Name of the parent screen (a wizard for its steps, a page for its sections/modals). Null for top-level pages or unattached components.

navigatesTo.description: Screen names this screen can navigate to (outbound edges in the navigation graph). Targets must exist in the catalog — enforced by validate-screen-catalog.js invariant #4.

modals.description: Names of modal screens owned by this screen

children.description: Names of child screens (steps for wizards, sections for pages). Must be consistent with each child's parent field — enforced by invariant #6.

designTokens.description: Design-token application status. applied = mockup was generated with current tokens. pending = mockup exists but predates current tokens. Null = no mockup yet.

tokenDependencies.description: Design-token keys this screen's mockup consumes (e.g., 'color.primary.500', 'gradient.hero'). Populated by /mockups during generation; read by /design-system propagation to find affected mockups on token change.
